arts.ttl: Roma Lock Down Touted Youth Product with Long-Term Deal
arts.sum: Roma have taken care of one of the two pending renewals, as they have announced to have reached an agreement with Niccolò Pisilli on a new contract until 2029. Their other youngster waiting to do the same is goalie Mile Svilar. The post Roma Lock Down Touted Youth Product with Long-Term Deal appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
